title: NZ Government Cloud First Policy
description: New Zealand government's mandatory Cloud First policy requiring public sector organisations to adopt public cloud services for information systems in preference to on-premises infrastructure. Establishes requirements for data classification, multi-cloud strategies, cost optimisation, and risk assessment.

source.page_title: Cloud First policy | NZ Digital government

changelog.change: Initial draft created from external source - NZ Government Cloud First Policy establishing mandatory public cloud adoption requirements for public sector organisations.
